description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian in a highly distorted and abstracted form, with elongated limbs and a stretched, triangular upper body. The head is visible beneath the wide, tent-like structure, and the legs are unnaturally extended, giving the figure a surreal, almost spider-like appearance. The upper body appears to be draped or covered by a large, angular cloak or fabric, which merges with the arms and extends outward. The feet are visible at the base, with one foot slightly forward, suggesting a crouched or crawling posture. The overall form is highly stylized and does not conform to typical human proportions, with exaggerated and warped features. The surface appears matte and fabric-like, with some areas resembling clothing folds.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and a wide, tent-like upper body, crouched in a surreal, abstract posture. The head and feet are visible beneath a large, angular cloak or drape.
description_view_0: From this view, the head and both feet are clearly visible beneath the wide, triangular upper body, emphasizing the crouched, spider-like posture.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the extreme elongation of the limbs and the angular, stretched nature of the upper body, with one foot and the head partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the angular cloak-like structure, with the legs and head mostly obscured, and the intersecting upper elements prominent.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the stretched limbs and the tent-like upper body, with the other foot more visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve top and pants with a large draped outer garment
